rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. 1)TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE STANDING. PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION TESTIMONY AND DECLARATIONS FROM BRANDFUSION PERSONNEL INDICATE THAT ONLY HARD ASSETS WERE TRANSFERRED TO BRANDFUSION AND REMAINING ASSETS REVERTED TO PLAINTIFF BY OPERATION OF CORP. 2004, 2)TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER CUSTOMER LIST CONSTITUTES A TRADE SECRET, WHETHER PLAINTIFF TOOK REASONABLE EFFORTS TO MAINTAIN SECRECY, AND MISAPPROPRIATION. (TRADE SECRET MISAPP. CAUSE OF ACTION) 3)TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER DEFENDANT BREACHED FIDUCIARY DUTY BECAUSE DEFENDANT WORKED AFTER ANJALU SALE CONSUMMATED. (BREACH OF FIDUCIARY CAUSE OF ACTION) 4)TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE INTENTIONAL INTERFERENCE WITH CLIENT RELATIONSHIPS. 5)DENY AS TO DECLARATORY RELIEF BECAUSE MOVING PAPERS DO NOT RAISE ISSUE IN POINTS & AUTHORITIES. (PB)
